title: crataegus laevigata subsp. walokochiana
intro: Crataegus laevigata subsp. walokochiana, also known as the smooth hawthorn, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular function, and potentially reducing the risk of heart disease. The herbal preparations of smooth hawthorn can be found in various forms, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully confirm its efficacy and safety.
